data.body:
[5/10(Tue) Ban Notice]
We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing the in-game system in Total Assault.

▶ Total number of players banned: 3
▶ Period of Restriction: Permanent
More details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/98322
